parsed_output.justification: Justin’s comments repeatedly identify them as a “copycat” who reportedly saw a werewolf in the center. In the game, a copycat (Doppelganger) adopts whatever role they observe in the center. If they saw a werewolf, they would become a werewolf. Most other players’ remarks (particularly in the later part of the discussion) suspect Justin’s identity and imply that he is the suspicion. Therefore, voting against Justin—identifying him as the likely werewolf—is the most sensible action from a Village perspective.
